evals.prompt: Add Playwright E2E tests for a login flow with a locked-account error state.
evals.expected_output: Routes to e2e, generates Playwright tests using stable selectors, covers success and locked-account failure, and includes run command.

evals.prompt: Create Cypress smoke coverage for checkout: cart review, payment submit, and order confirmation.
evals.expected_output: Routes to e2e, generates Cypress tests for the checkout happy path with deterministic assertions and avoids brittle waits.

evals.prompt: Write Supertest coverage for POST /api/invoices including validation and unauthorized cases.
evals.expected_output: Routes to api, generates Supertest tests for success, validation failure, and auth failure with realistic payloads.

evals.prompt: Generate pytest API tests for a FastAPI users endpoint with duplicate-email handling.
evals.expected_output: Routes to api, uses pytest/client fixture style, covers create success and duplicate conflict behavior.

evals.prompt: Build a Postman/Newman collection for our public status API and include CI-friendly environment variables.
evals.expected_output: Routes to api, produces a Postman/Newman collection structure with variableized base URL and response assertions.

evals.prompt: Create a k6 load test for GET /search with p95 under 700ms and less than 1% failures.
evals.expected_output: Routes to perf, generates a k6 script with BASE_URL config, ramping scenario, checks, and requested thresholds.

evals.prompt: Write a Locust test that models 80% browsing and 20% checkout traffic.
evals.expected_output: Routes to perf, generates Locust user tasks with weighted behavior, configurable host, and response validation.

evals.prompt: Add tests for the password reset feature. It needs browser coverage for request, email-link landing, and invalid token.
evals.expected_output: Routes to e2e because browser journey is explicit, covers happy path and invalid token, and discusses test data setup.

evals.prompt: Generate regression tests for the orders API from this OpenAPI fragment.
evals.expected_output: Routes to api, uses the OpenAPI contract as the source for realistic request and response assertions.

evals.prompt: Make sure the reports page can handle Monday morning traffic without p95 going over 1.2s.
evals.expected_output: Routes to perf, identifies a load/performance scenario, creates configurable script and percentile threshold.

evals.prompt: Create evals for our support chatbot so we can catch prompt regressions in refund-policy answers.
evals.expected_output: Routes to ai-output, creates output-quality eval cases with deterministic and rubric assertions, and includes a runner/report structure.

evals.prompt: Add RAG answer quality tests that verify citations point to the retrieved source chunks and unsupported claims fail.
evals.expected_output: Routes to ai-output, separates retrieval and answer-grounding assertions, and tests missing-context behavior.

evals.prompt: Build tool-use evals for an agent that should search files, patch one file, run tests, and stop.
evals.expected_output: Routes to ai-tool-use, defines fixture workspace, expected tool trace assertions, final-state checks, and max-call limits.

evals.prompt: Test that our agent recovers when the first tool call returns an empty result instead of pretending it found the answer.
evals.expected_output: Routes to ai-tool-use, creates mocked failure/empty tool responses and assertions for recovery behavior.

evals.prompt: Benchmark our AI code review assistant for p95 latency, token usage, and cost per passing review.
evals.expected_output: Routes to ai-perf, creates a benchmark harness that records latency, tokens, model/tool calls, cost, and quality pass/fail together.

evals.prompt: Compare two model versions for a background research agent and report throughput, retry rate, and quality-per-dollar.
evals.expected_output: Routes to ai-perf, generates multi-run benchmark cases with baseline comparison and quality-adjusted cost metrics.
